steps.title: Identify the given minimum and maximum distances
steps.content: The problem states the hummingbird traveled a minimum of 1,620 miles and a maximum of 4,240 miles. So the distance d must be at least 1,620 and at most 4,240. $$1620 \le d$$ and $$d \le 4240$$.

steps.title: Combine into a compound inequality and match the choice
steps.content: From the two inequalities we have $$1620 \le d$$ and $$d \le 4240$$. Combining them gives the compound inequality $$1620 \le d \le 4240$$. That confirms B is correct.
